entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'You are rewriting 77 of C++/* source files to remove ALL *(QT Deps). The Project uses C++/Win32(MSVC++ 2002) MSVC 2022). CRITICAL RULES:

No Qt headers (#include <Q...>)
No Qt types (QString, QObject, QProcess, QTimer, QFile, QDir, QJsonObject, etc.)
No Qt macros (Q_OBJECT, emit, signals, slots)
No Qt functions (qDebug, qWarning, qInfo, qEnvironmentVariable, qApp, etc.)
Use std::string, std::vector, std::filesystem, std::mutex, std::regex, fprintf(stderr,...), std::getenv
Use #include "json_types.hpp" for JSON (provides JsonObject = std::unordered_map<std::string, JsonValue>, JsonArray = std::vector<JsonValue>, JsonDoc with static toJson())
For process execution, use Win32 CreateProcess with anonymous pipes
For UUID, use Win32 CoCreateGuid or a simple random generator
For HTTP, use WinHTTP (winhttp.h)
For timestamps, use std::chrono with a helper to format ISO 8601
Callbacks are function pointers (not std::function), declared in the headers
The project has these NEW headers (already written):

self_patch.hpp: class SelfPatch with methods addKernel, addCpp, hotReload, patchFile. Callbacks: fireKernelAdded, fireCppAdded, fireReloadStarted, fireReloadDone.

self_test.hpp: class SelfTest with runAll, runUnitTests, runIntegrationTests, runLint, runBenchmarkBaseline. Private: runProcess, parseTPS, checkBenchmarkRegression, log. Members: m_output, m_error. LogCallback.

self_test_gate.hpp: just bool runSelfTestGate(); (already clean, no Qt)

sentry_integration.hpp: singleton with initialize, captureException, captureMessage, addBreadcrumb, startTransaction, finishTransaction, setUser. Has m_dsn, m_activeTransactions (std::unordered_map<string,int64_t>), m_breadcrumbs (vector<JsonObject>), m_mutex. Callbacks: m_errCb, m_txCb.

sign_binary.hpp: just bool signBinary(const std::string& exePath);

telemetry_collector.hpp: singleton with initialize, trackFeatureUsage, trackCrash, trackPerformance, getAllTelemetryData, clearAllData, flushData. Members: m_enabled, m_sessionId, m_sessionStartTime, m_mutex, m_featureUsage (unordered_map<string,int>), m_events (vector<JsonObject>). Private: sanitize, sendTelemetry, loadUserConsent, saveUserConsent. Callbacks.

zero_touch.hpp: just simple class with installAll, installFileWatcher, installGitHook, installVoiceTrigger. m_lastVoiceWish string.

rollback.hpp (unchanged): class Rollback { bool detectRegression(); bool revertLastCommit(); bool openIssue(string,string); };

Please create these #/* files using the create_file tool at the specified paths. Make them COMPILABLE C++20 code.

 - lets get all these converted and integrated fully into the CLI/Win32GUI/HTML -> Forward we march!

'
